API Reference#

  • Cell
  • Porous Layers
  • Catalyst Layers
  • Flow Channels

  • Tools and Utilities

Quick class summary#

Cell

marapendi.cell.fuelcell.FuelCell([ca, an, ...])

Proton exchange membrane fuel cell.

marapendi.cell.fuelcell.FuelCellSide([cl, ...])

One side (anode or cathode) of a PEM fuel cell.

marapendi.cell.state.CellState([ca, an, ...])

Full state of the cell at one operating point.

marapendi.cell.state.CellSideState([cl, ...])

State of one side (anode or cathode) of the cell.

marapendi.cell.state.CatalystLayerState([...])

State of a catalyst layer, in addition to the generic layer state.

marapendi.cell.state.MembraneState([...])

State of the membrane.

Porous layers

marapendi.porous_layers.porous_layers.PorousLayer([...])

Represents a porous layer in a fuel cell or electrolyzer, defining its static geometry and material properties.

marapendi.porous_layers.porous_layers.GasDiffusionLayer([...])

Gas diffusion layer: a PorousLayer with typical GDL defaults.

marapendi.porous_layers.porous_layers.MicroPorousLayer([...])

Microporous layer (MPL): a PorousLayer with typical MPL defaults.

marapendi.porous_layers.darcy.DarcyTransportModel([...])

Model for calculating non-wetting phase transport in porous layers using a Darcy-based approach.

marapendi.porous_layers.diffusion.PorousGasDiffusionModel([...])

Porous media gas transport model with water saturation and Knudsen corrections.

Catalyst layers

marapendi.porous_layers.catalyst_layers.CatalystLayer([...])

Base class for catalyst layers in fuel cells and electrolysers.

marapendi.porous_layers.catalyst_layers.PtCCatalystLayer([...])

Catalyst layer with explicit Pt/C agglomerate geometry and ionomer film.

marapendi.thermo.electrochemistry.ElectrochemicalReaction([...])

Parameters of a single-reactant electrochemical reaction (ORR or HOR).

Flow channels

marapendi.channel.flow_channels.FlowChannel([...])

Flow channel geometry and state of a single fuel-cell side.

marapendi.channel.gas_transport_resistance.ChannelGasResistanceModel([...])

Channel gas transport resistance using a Sherwood-number approach.

marapendi.channel.gas_transport_resistance.BakerChannelGasResistanceModel([...])

Empirical channel gas transport resistance (Baker et al. 2009).

Membrane and ionomer

marapendi.membrane.ionomer_base.Ionomer(...)

Dry material properties of an ion-exchange polymer.

marapendi.membrane.pem.PFSAIonomer([...])

PFSA ionomer (e.g. Nafion) with empirical fits for conductivity and O₂ transport.

marapendi.membrane.membrane_base.Membrane([...])

Static properties of a proton/anion exchange membrane.

marapendi.membrane.pem.PFSA([dry_thickness, ...])

Perfluorosulfonic-acid (PFSA, e.g. Nafion) membrane.

marapendi.water_balance.water_balance.WaterBalanceModel([...])

A class representing a membrane water balance model with various parameters related to water diffusivity and absorption.

marapendi.water_balance.membrane_pwl.MembraneWaterBalanceModelPiecewise([...])

Membrane water balance using a piecewise linear sorption isotherm.

marapendi.water_balance.membrane.MembraneWaterBalanceModel([...])

Steady-state membrane water balance using an analytical profile solution.

Models

marapendi.cell.explicit_steady_state.ExplicitSteadyStateModel([...])

Explicit steady-state model for PEMFC polarization curves.

marapendi.cell.implicit_steady_state.ImplicitSteadyStateModel([...])

Implicit steady-state model for PEMFC polarization curves.

marapendi.cell.transient.TransientModel([...])

Transient PEMFC model integrating MEA temperature and membrane water content.

Operating conditions

marapendi.simulation.conditions.CellConditions(...)

Full set of operating conditions for a steady-state cell simulation.

marapendi.simulation.conditions.SideConditions([...])

Inlet boundary conditions for one side of the cell (cathode or anode).

Parameter estimation

marapendi.estimation.base_calibration.BaseModelCalibration(...)

marapendi.estimation.polarization_curve_calibration.SteadyStatePolarizationCurveCalibration(...)

Calibration of a steady-state polarisation curve model against voltage and HFR data.

marapendi.estimation.parameters.Parameter(value)

A fixed model parameter with display metadata.

marapendi.estimation.parameters.UnknownParameter(value)

A parameter to be estimated, with bounds and normalisation type.

previous

Parameter estimation
